data.page_content:
Welcome to the Divoom API

    
##### command description

- select dial type.

##### Request URL
- ` https://appin.divoom-gz.com/Channel/MyClockGetList `
  
##### Request method
- GET 

##### Request parameters

|Name|DATA TYPE|DESCRIPTION|
|:-----  |:-----|-----                           |
|DeviceId |number   |device id  |
|StartNum |number   |>=1  |
|EndNum |number   |>=1  |
|DeviceType |string   |Frame  |

##### request example 
{
    "DeviceId":     300251436,
    "StartNum":     1,
    "EndNum":     100,
	"DeviceType":	"Frame"
}



##### respone parameters

|Name|DATA TYPE|DESCRIPTION|
|:-----  |:-----|-----                           |
|ClockList |Array   |  |
|ClockId |number   |clock id  |
|ClockName |string   |the clock name  |
|ImagePixelId |string   | Dial Preview Image ，The request address is this string plus“ https://fin.divoom-gz.ocm/ ”Prefix  |
|Position |number   |the clock position  |



##### respone example 

